scores.correctness_notes: Fully matches gold standard on all key points: fail() doesn't interrupt execution, clean exit vs crash, unit error state difference, juju resolve requirement
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor inaccuracy: claims exception traceback is shown to user via stderr/Juju, but gold standard says error details are only in Juju log, not action output. Also the 'action-fail hook tool' detail is a reasonable inference but not in gold standard. The claim that 'Juju marks the action as failed' with 'raw traceback shown to user' contradicts gold standard which says error details are only in Juju log.
